title: StateDelta
description: A typed record of a constitutional state transition in one domain

state_delta_id.description: Unique identifier for this state delta

transition_id.description: Parent transition this delta belongs to

delta_domain.description: Constitutional domain in which this delta occurred

target.description: The entity or resource that changed (e.g. 'yubikey.slot_1', 'capability.vision', 'abi.CPSPacket.v1')

proof_ref.description: Optional reference to a ProofEntry proof_id (PRF-XXXXXXXX)

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the delta was recorded
